hypothesis: Appending an exact visible component type/count inventory to the immutable E521 prompts can align component-plan supervision with observable input without changing corpus admission.

recipe.projection_only_reason: E521 is already strictly admitted, semantically deduplicated, and decontaminated; rerunning those content-sensitive gates would change the matched snapshot.

invalid_attempts.reason: Applying component text before semantic dedup changed admitted membership to 230 rows. Local only, unpublished, and not evidence.
Moving all prompt projections after admission rebuilt from pre-E521 roots and restored 260 rows. Local only, unpublished, and not evidence.
Reapplying semantic dedup to immutable E521 removed one additional row. Local only, unpublished, and not evidence.

feedback_action.decision: No producer or gate change is warranted; the projection-only build emitted no warnings, recommendations, or experiment candidates.

decision: Publish E524 for one matched bounded continuation against E522. This is data-quality evidence only; component counts are a stronger prompt contract than ordinary OOD requests, so learned gains must be interpreted as conditional-contract evidence rather than unconditional ship readiness.
